_provenance.description: Hand-curated, wiki-verified production recipes. (1) The cost-layer golden potion chain (Attack potion via Guam). (2) The income-layer green-dragons exemplar PROCESSING chain (green dragonhide --tan--> green dragon leather --craft--> green d'hide body), proving the multi-step iron realization (tan service fee + Crafting gate + best-realization). The tan record carries service_fee_coins (a tanner SERVICE, not an item input) so realize.py subtracts the internal cost. Bulk recipe/service sourcing from the OSRS Wiki production tables is a disclosed v1 follow-up. No live wiki fetch during build.

records.name: Attack potion(3)
records.source: Herblore: mix Guam potion (unf) + Eye of newt

records.name: Guam potion (unf)
records.source: Herblore: Guam leaf + Vial of water

records.name: Vial of water
records.source: Fill an empty Vial at any water source (free); cost is the empty vial

records.name: Green dragon leather
records.source: Tan a green dragonhide at a standard tanner (Ellis, Al Kharid / Crafting Guild / etc.). PINNED: standard tanner fee = 20 coins/hide (OSRS Wiki Tanning + Tanner + Green dragon leather pages all agree on 20 for green d'hide at a standard tanner). The 40-200 range is Eodan only -- a NON-STANDARD, diary-reducible tanner -- and is NOT the standard fee; not modelled in v1. Sbott/Chouani variants and the Magic Tan Leather spell (78 Magic) are alternate routes, not modelled.

records.name: Green d'hide body
records.source: Crafting: 3 Green dragon leather + 1 thread (item:1734; needle item:1733) at Crafting 63 -> 186 Crafting xp. PINNED from OSRS Wiki Green d'hide body.
